title: get_spaces/get_contacts: N queries instead of SQL IN clause
description: store.rs: get_spaces(Some(ids)), get_contacts(Some(ids)), get_messages, get_space_invites all execute one SELECT WHERE id=? per element. N ids = N sequential SQLite round-trips. A single SELECT WHERE id IN (?,?,...) would be O(1) queries. Expected impact: JMAP startup fetching all contacts on a large roster will be measurably slower than necessary.
